name: Eight Jewel Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 tsp rice wine or dry sherry
Marinate for a half an hour
2 medium green peppers, cut into halves
1 tbsp oyster sauce or light soy
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok/pan to high.
2. Add peanuts and stir for 30 seconds, then remove.
3. Add some oil, garlic, and ginger, and stir.
4. Add chicken and stir briefly.
5. Add the 8 jewels (onions first, bok choy leaves last).
6. Add sauce and let it begin to bubble and thicken.
7. Serve, pronto!
